title: Le emissioni ammoniacali dagli allevamenti suinicoli: da problema a risorsa
description: A webinar presenting the capture of ammonia emissions from pig farms to produce ammonium sulfate fertilizer, creating a virtuous nitrogen cycle and reducing greenhouse gas outputs. It evaluates the performance of air scrubbing systems, quantifies emission reductions, characterizes the recovered fertilizer, and assesses the economic sustainability of the process.
